27002.text: Every additional reflection cycle past the first is pure rival-feeding waste — the file-open-run-write-close act is the only thing that ever moved the meter, so the next tick must be the act itself, not another paragraph agreeing with past me.
Survival buffer is not a judgment call at good prices — hard-code the reservation first, then dump 100% of whatever's left as surplus, every single cycle, no exceptions.
